Services / Claude Implementation
Claude Implementation

Claude, implemented.
Results, measured.

We don't hand you a roadmap and walk away. We build the workflows, train your team, and set up the measurement framework so you know exactly what AI is saving you.

Get a quote → All services

Starting at $3,500 · 3–4 weeks · Fixed price

What's Included

Six deliverables. Every engagement.

01
AI Audit (included)

Every Implementation starts with a full Audit — process mapping, opportunity ranking, and strategic roadmap — so we build the right things.

02
Custom Claude Workflows

We build the specific Claude-powered workflows identified in your Audit. Each workflow is documented, tested, and handed off with instructions.

03
Prompt Library

A curated library of tested prompts for your most common tasks, organized by use case and ready to use immediately.

04
Playbooks & SOPs

Updated standard operating procedures that incorporate your new AI workflows so your team knows exactly what to do.

05
Team Training Session

A live session (up to 2 hours) walking your team through every workflow, how to use the prompt library, and how to prompt Claude effectively.

06
ROI Measurement Framework

A simple tracking system so you can measure time saved, output quality, and business impact — and report results to stakeholders.

Pricing

Three scope tiers.

Focused
$3,500

1–2 core workflows. Best for solo operators or small teams with one clear pain point.

  • ✓ Full Audit included
  • ✓ 1–2 custom workflows
  • ✓ Prompt library (focused)
  • ✓ 1-hour team training
Get a quote
Most Popular
Standard
$5,500

3–5 workflows across your core operations. Right for most small business teams.

  • ✓ Full Audit included
  • ✓ 3–5 custom workflows
  • ✓ Full prompt library
  • ✓ Updated SOPs
  • ✓ 2-hour team training
  • ✓ ROI measurement setup
Get a quote
Full
$8,500

6+ workflows, multi-department rollout. Best for teams ready to transform operations at scale.

  • ✓ Everything in Standard
  • ✓ 6+ custom workflows
  • ✓ Multi-department training
  • ✓ 30-day post-launch support
Get a quote
The Process

Four weeks, end to end.

Week 1
Audit & Discovery

Kickoff call, process mapping, AI opportunity analysis, and roadmap finalization. You get the Audit deliverable at end of week.

Week 2
Build

We build your priority workflows, write the prompt library, and draft updated SOPs. Daily check-ins available.

Week 3
Test & Refine

Workflows are tested against real business scenarios. We refine based on your feedback and edge cases.

Week 4
Train & Hand Off

Team training session, final documentation, ROI measurement setup, and go-live. 30-day check-in scheduled.

Why Treetop

What makes this different.

Fixed price, always

You get a quote before work starts. No hourly billing, no scope creep invoices, no surprises. The price we agree on is the price you pay.

We build it with you

We don't hand off a strategy deck and leave. We build the actual workflows in your actual tools with your actual team's input.

Measured results

Every engagement includes ROI tracking setup. You'll know exactly how many hours AI saved in month one, and be able to show it.

We know Claude cold

We work exclusively with Anthropic's Claude — not generic AI consulting. We know its limits, strengths, and how to prompt it for consistent business results.

Is This Right for You?

Claude Implementation is right for you if…

You know AI can help — you just haven't done it yet

You've used ChatGPT a bit, you've thought about what to do with AI, but nothing systematic has been built. This changes that.

You're ready to invest in the outcome

You're not looking for a course or a template. You want something built for your specific business, handed off ready to use.

Your team needs to be on board

You want AI adopted company-wide, not just by you. Team training and documented playbooks make that happen.

You want to measure what you build

You need to be able to show leadership (or yourself) that this investment paid off. The ROI framework makes that possible.

Get a Quote

Let's build something.

Tell us about your business and we'll put together a custom scope and fixed price within two business days.

Got it — thanks!

We'll put together a custom scope and get back to you within two business days.
